prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime-style cyberpunk illustration of Kapupu, a stylish teen girl sitting on the edge of a high rooftop above a dense futuristic Tokyo-like city at dusk. She has short messy deep violet-black bob hair with glowing purple rim light, a confident cool pose, and her face intentionally covered by a soft square purple censor block for a mysterious look. Balance a small cupcake on top of her head, with purple frosting, chocolate drizzle, and a red cherry. She wears an oversized purple hoodie covered in punk patches, skull-and-crossbones graphics, anime sticker art, and a large back patch reading “SKELETON,” with short black shorts, purple socks, and chunky black platform sneakers decorated with skull motifs and neon accents. She sits sideways with one hand braced on the rooftop ledge, one leg bent and the other dangling over the city, lit by magenta and blue neon. The rooftop surface is black and worn, covered in graffiti, stickers, skull doodles, stars, and a large pink spray-painted word “DREAM.” Behind her is an overwhelming neon cityscape packed with skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and readable Japanese-style signs, including large vertical signs with “未来,” “夢を追え,” “星団,” and smaller signs such as “ホテル,” “LIVE,” “OPEN DRIVE,” and “2024,” all glowing in saturated pink, violet, cyan, and electric blue. The sky is a spectacular star-filled cosmic panorama with a bright galactic nebula on the upper right, countless stars, and exactly 7 visible shooting stars or meteors streaking diagonally across the sky in blue, purple, and gold. Add a bright sunset flare on the horizon between the buildings, dramatic rim lighting, glossy highlights, intricate linework, ultra-detailed textures, high contrast, vibrant synthwave palette, cinematic perspective, and a polished gpt-image-2 anime illustration finish.
